title: Senior Software Engineer - Capital Float Ventures Solutions - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Capital Float Ventures Solutions - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Capital Float Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About Capital Float Ventures Solutions:
Capital Float Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float Ventures Solutions!
